zh.Stamford, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾斯坦福
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Browne於1380年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福時，他的父親John Browne V31歲，母親Elizabeth Morgan32歲。他於1405年與Margery Berney在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福被列為draper (cloth merchant) of the staple of calais。他去世於1442年7月26日在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Browne于1380年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福时，他的父亲John Browne V31岁，母亲Elizabeth Morgan32岁。他于1405年与Margery Berney在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福被列为draper (cloth merchant) of the staple of calais。他去世于1442年7月26日在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Browne was born in 1380, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, his father, John Browne V, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth Morgan, was 32. He married Margery Berney in 1405, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as draper (cloth merchant) of the staple of calais in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 26 July 1442, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Stamford All Saints Church, Stamford, Li: All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Browne est né en 1380, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Browne V, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Morgan, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margery Berney en 1405, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est draper (cloth merchant) of the staple of calais à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1442, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Browne 1380 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Browne V 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Morgan 32. Er hat 1405 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Margery Berney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als draper (cloth merchant) of the staple of calais in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. Juli 1442 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margery Berney nel 1405, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come draper (cloth merchant) of the staple of calais nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. ja.lifeSummary: John Browneが1380年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで生まれた時，父John Browne Vは31歳，母Elizabeth Morganは32歳であった。1405年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードでMargery Berneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードでの職業はdraper (cloth merchant) of the staple of calaisと記録されている。彼は1442年7月26日に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Stamford All Saints Church, Stamford, Li: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Browne(이)가 1380년 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Browne V(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Morgan(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 Margery Berney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 draper (cloth merchant) of the staple of calais이었다. 그는 1442년 7월 26일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드 앨 세인츠' c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Browne nasceu em 1380, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Browne V, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Morgan, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Berney em 1405, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como draper (cloth merchant) of the staple of calais em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 26 de julho de 1442, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stamford All Saints Church, Stamford, Li: алл сеинц' чурч, стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Browne родился в 1380 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Browne V было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Morgan, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Berney в 1405 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии draper (cloth merchant) of the staple of calais в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 26 июля 1442 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц' чурч, стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Browne nació en 1380, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Browne V, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Morgan, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margery Berney en 1405, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era draper (cloth merchant) of the staple of calais en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 26 de julio de 1442, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
